items.title: The Price of Silver Is Falling Again: Why Safe-Haven Assets Are Down as the Middle East Crisis Escalates
items.description: Precious metals, especially gold, rose on Monday following news of the attack on Iran, but they’re seeing a reversal today. Here’s the latest.

items.title: Leaders, How You Handle Employee Exits Matters. Here’s How Communication Directly Impacts Trust
items.description: When an employee suddenly disappears from company systems, the silence doesn’t stay silent, it becomes a story.

items.title: Digital Twins Are About to Transform Oil and Gas—Here’s Who’s Winning the Race
items.description: Digital twins allow operators to proactively manage the situation rather than sitting back while issues emerge in the field.

items.title: Jerry Seinfeld is Worth $1.1 Billion. So Why Does He Still Work So (Darned) Hard?
items.description: For the same reason you should–no matter what your net worth–if you want to live a fulfilling life.

items.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Asks Himself This 1 Question When Making Tough Decisions. Philosophers Approve
items.description: Tim Cook explained how he chose to join Apple when it was still struggling. It’s a masterclass in making tough calls.
